title: Leaf_Cutter: a reproducible poison-exon discovery pipeline for zebrafish
description: Leaf_Cutter is an open-source, end-to-end pipeline for discovering and quantifying unproductive splicing and poison exons in Danio rerio RNA-seq data. It wraps LeafCutter2 with developmentally-resolved PE discovery, POISEN long-read validation, GTEx integration, and a FastAPI + vanilla-JS web app with optional Slurm submission.
